description: A color photograph of an official White House/presidential event. Donald Trump stands at a wooden podium bearing the Seal of the President of the United States, speaking into a microphone, wearing a navy suit and purple tie. To his left stand three men in suits (apparent administration officials/guests, one resembling RFK Jr.). Behind them is a wood-paneled stage with a White House logo medallion on the left wall, an American flag and a presidential flag, and a large screen backdrop displaying the text 'TrumpRx.gov' twice. The only on-image text is the 'TrumpRx.gov' website branding that is part of the physical set, not a graphic overlay; this is a documentary event photograph rather than a designed meme. It promotes the administration's TrumpRx prescription-drug pricing initiative referenced in the tweet ('expanded to feature more than 600 generic medications... Lower costs. Better access.').
